hero.subheadline: Free, referral-led, culturally adapted perinatal education and community support for vulnerable, Minority Ethnic, migrant, refugee, and displaced women across Norfolk.

impact.sectionDesc: Through referral-led, culturally adapted perinatal education across three annual cohorts, we are reaching the women who need support the most.

gallery.sectionDesc: Every mother deserves access to culturally sensitive perinatal support, regardless of background or circumstance.
gallery.bottomText: Go Nurture Initiative CIC is a Norfolk-based Community Interest Company providing free, referral-led perinatal support to vulnerable, Minority Ethnic, migrant, refugee, and displaced women.

fundingBridge.sectionDesc: Every purchase from our commercial arm directly funds free community perinatal support for women who need it most.
fundingBridge.step1Desc: Buy maternity education packages from Nurtured and Nourished Health Ltd
fundingBridge.step2Desc: A portion of profits transfers as Corporate Social Responsibility to Go Nurture CIC
fundingBridge.step3Desc: Funds provide free culturally adapted perinatal education to vulnerable women in Norfolk
fundingBridge.ctaDesc: Our transparency dashboard shows exactly how every pound creates community impact.

footer.commercialDesc: Purchases from our parent company fund these free community services.

about.introDesc: Go Nurture Initiative CIC is an asset-locked Community Interest Company (CIC) and the social impact arm of Nurtured & Nourished Women's Health Ltd. We deliver free, referral-led, culturally adapted perinatal education and community support to vulnerable, Minority Ethnic, migrant, refugee, and displaced women across Norfolk.
about.missionDesc: Every mother deserves access to high-quality perinatal support, regardless of her background, immigration status, or financial situation. We exist to bridge the gap between traditional maternity services and the women who are too often left behind.
about.howDesc: A portion of profits from our commercial parent company — Nurtured and Nourished Women's Health Ltd — is transferred through Corporate Social Responsibility to fund the free community programmes delivered by Go Nurture Initiative CIC. This ensures financial sustainability while keeping services completely free for the women who need them.
about.pilotDesc: Our pilot programme will support 30 vulnerable women across three annual cohorts. Each cohort will receive culturally adapted perinatal education, birth preparation, and postnatal support — all delivered in a safe, welcoming, and multilingual environment.
about.referralDesc: Access to our programmes is through verified referral partners only — including NHS teams, local midwives, health visitors, English Plus, Bridge Plus, New Routes, community churches, and mosques. This ensures every woman is connected to the support she needs through trusted professionals.
about.ctaDesc: If you are a healthcare professional, community organisation, or faith group interested in becoming a referral partner, we would love to hear from you.

programmes.introDesc: Our programmes are designed specifically for vulnerable, Minority Ethnic, migrant, refugee, and displaced women. All sessions are free, referral-led, and delivered in a safe, welcoming, and multilingual environment.
programmes.cohortsDesc: Each year, we run three cohorts of our community perinatal programme. Each cohort supports up to 10 women through a comprehensive journey of education, preparation, and postnatal care.
programmes.educationDesc: Our culturally adapted sessions cover pregnancy wellbeing, birth preparation, infant feeding, and early parenting — all delivered with sensitivity to diverse cultural backgrounds and in multiple languages.
programmes.supportDesc: We provide continued postnatal support to ensure every mother feels confident, cared for, and connected to her community during the crucial weeks and months after birth.
programmes.multilingualDesc: All programmes are delivered with professional interpretation support in Arabic, Somali, Ukrainian, Farsi, Tigrinya, Kurdish, and English. We ensure language is never a barrier to accessing quality care.
programmes.partnersDesc: Our programmes are accessible only through verified referral partners — including NHS teams, midwives, health visitors, English Plus, Bridge Plus, New Routes, local churches, and mosques.

communitySupport.introDesc: Go Nurture Initiative CIC works hand-in-hand with a network of trusted community organisations, faith groups, and healthcare professionals across Norfolk to ensure every vulnerable mother receives the support she needs.
communitySupport.partnersDesc: We work with a wide range of experienced partners who share our commitment to supporting vulnerable women. Our referral network includes healthcare professionals, community organisations, and faith-based groups who are already trusted by the communities we serve.
communitySupport.partnerList: NHS Norfolk & Waveney Integrated Care Board | Community Midwives & Health Visitors | English Plus (Language Support) | Bridge Plus (Migrant Support) | New Routes (Refugee Support) | Local Churches & Community Groups | Local Mosques & Faith Centres | Family Support Services
communitySupport.supportDesc1: Perinatal education and birth preparation in multiple languages
communitySupport.supportDesc2: Postnatal support and early parenting guidance
communitySupport.supportDesc3: One-to-one support sessions for vulnerable mothers
communitySupport.supportDesc4: Community connection and peer support networks
communitySupport.involveDesc: If your organisation works with vulnerable, Minority Ethnic, migrant, refugee, or displaced women in Norfolk, we welcome you to join our referral partner network. Together, we can ensure no mother is left without the support she deserves.

contact.introDesc: Whether you are a potential referral partner, a supporter interested in our mission, or a community member looking for information, please get in touch.
contact.partnerDesc: If you are a healthcare professional, community organisation, or faith group interested in becoming a referral partner, please use the form below or contact us directly.
contact.formMessagePlaceholder: Tell us more about your enquiry...
contact.formSuccess: Thank you for your message. We will get back to you soon.
contact.ctaDesc: Log in to the secure partner portal to submit a referral.
